employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated GroupConfig API with the new setClusterName method required by newer Hazelcast versions.
Update ManagementCenterConfig to use the new setConsoleEnabled API instead of the old URL-based configuration.
Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Migrate annotation imports from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Update Hazelcast index creation API to use explicit IndexType enum instead of boolean flag.
Replace deprecated Predicates utility class with PredicateBuilder API for constructing query predicates.
employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: PredicateBuilder.EntryObject eo = new PredicateBuilderImpl().getEntryObject(); Predicate predicate = eo.get("personId").equal(personId);

employee-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace deprecated Repository.findOne() method with findById().orElseThrow() to align with Spring Data JPA 2.4+ standards.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3 requirements.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Replaced @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) and org.junit.Test with org.junit.jupiter.api.Test and removed the runner annotation.

employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.general_idea: Introduce Testcontainers to provide a dynamic MySQL instance for integration tests, replacing static or external database dependencies.
employee-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin.human_impl: Added @Testcontainers, @Container MySQLContainer, and @DynamicPropertySource to configure the datasource URL dynamically.

person-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Change the Hazelcast bean definition to return ClientConfig instead of HazelcastInstance, likely to delegate instance creation to Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Remove the manual CacheManager bean definition, relying on Spring Boot's auto-configuration for Hazelcast caching.
Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Replace deprecated CrudRepository.findOne() with the standard Optional-based findById() method required in newer Spring Data versions.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.

person-service/src/test/java/pl/piomin/s.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 annotations and runner with JUnit 5 equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3 requirements.

employee-kubernetes-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Switched the Maven parent from spring-boot-starter-parent to a custom internal parent POM.
Removed the Lombok dependency, requiring manual getter/setter/constructor implementation.

employee-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove the Hazelcast client dependency, likely switching to embedded or server mode.

person-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace hazelcast-hibernate5 with hazelcast-spring to align with Spring Boot 3 integration patterns.
